languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, могу предположить, что Себериан был человеком выдающихся талантов и необыкновенной судьбы. Я сожалею о том, что мне не суждено узреть его вживую".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, могу предположить, что Себериан был человеком выдающихся талантов и необыкновенной судьбы. Я сожалею о том, что мне не суждено узреть его вживую".
traits.speaker: Vivisector

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, могу предположить, что Себериан был человеком выдающихся талантов и необыкновенной судьбы. Я сожалею о том, что мне не суждено узреть его вживую".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

languages.text: “大人，我想塞贝里安必定是一位才华卓越、命运非凡的人物。真遗憾，我竟注定无缘亲眼见得他的真容。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我想塞贝里安必定是一位才华卓越、命运非凡的人物。真遗憾，我竟注定无缘亲眼见得他的真容。”

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, imagino que Seberian fue un hombre de extraordinario talento con un destino no menos extraordinario. Lamento no haber tenido la fortuna de conocerlo en persona».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, imagino que Seberian fue un hombre de extraordinario talento con un destino no menos extraordinario. Lamento no haber tenido la fortuna de conocerlo en persona».

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, je pense que Seberian était un homme au destin extraordinaire doté de talents remarquables. Je regrette de ne jamais avoir eu la chance de le rencontrer. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, je pense que Seberian était un homme au destin extraordinaire doté de talents remarquables. Je regrette de ne jamais avoir eu la chance de le rencontrer. »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich glaube, dieser Seberian war ein Mann mit bemerkenswerten Talenten und einer außergewöhnlichen Bestimmung. Ich bedauere, dass ich ihn nie persönlich treffen konnte."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich glaube, dieser Seberian war ein Mann mit bemerkenswerten Talenten und einer außergewöhnlichen Bestimmung. Ich bedauere, dass ich ihn nie persönlich treffen konnte."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Seberian'ın olağanüstü yeteneklere ve sıra dışı bir kadere sahip bir adam olduğunu tahmin edebiliyorum. Onu asla kanlı canlı göremeyecek olmama üzülüyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Seberian'ın olağanüstü yeteneklere ve sıra dışı bir kadere sahip bir adam olduğunu tahmin edebiliyorum. Onu asla kanlı canlı göremeyecek olmama üzülüyorum."

languages.text: 「貴方様、私はシベリアは並外れた才能と運命に恵まれた人物だったと想像します。私は彼に会える運命になかったことを残念に思います。」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I imagine that Seberian was a man of remarkable talents and extraordinary destiny. I regret that I was fated never to see him in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、私はシベリアは並外れた才能と運命に恵まれた人物だったと想像します。私は彼に会える運命になかったことを残念に思います。」
